description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a hinged lid that opens upwards, revealing a spacious interior. The box is constructed from horizontal wooden planks, reinforced at the corners with vertical wooden beams secured by visible black bolts. Both longer sides feature rectangular cut-out handles for easy lifting and carrying. The wood has a natural, slightly weathered finish, with visible grain and some dark streaks, giving it a rustic appearance. The lid is attached with sturdy hinges and matches the rest of the box in material and finish. The overall design is robust and practical, suitable for storing tools, supplies, or miscellaneous items in an urban environment.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden storage box with a hinged lid, reinforced corners, and cut-out side handles. The box features a natural wood finish and is designed for practical storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open hinged lid, one cut-out handle, and the reinforced corner with visible bolts.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid fully open, displaying the spacious interior and both side handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the open lid and cut-out handle visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the closed lid, highlighting the horizontal plank construction and bolt pattern.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, shelf, or storage area
